headline: BlackBerry Is Back, But This Time It’s About Cars, Robots, and AI
summary: BlackBerry (NYSE:BB) stock is up more than 110% this year, and for the first time in a long time, Wall Street has a real reason to care.

headline: MSI Gains From a Growing Public Safety Ecosystem: More Upside Ahead?
summary: Motorola is building a larger public safety ecosystem with AI, acquisitions and record orders, backed by a $15.7B backlog and mission-critical demand.
